title: orchis papilionacea var. alibertis
side_effects: Orchis papilionacea var. alibertis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, respiratory issues, and skin irritation in some individuals. Ingesting the plant can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts may also result in headaches, fatigue, and dizziness. Improper use of the plant can also exacerbate underlying health conditions, such as kidney or liver problems, and interact with certain medications.
